description: Superhuman is a productivity software company offering products including Superhuman Mail, Coda, Grammarly, and Superhuman Go under the Superhuman platform. Its Mail product includes an MCP server that lets AI tools access a user's inbox and calendar.
summary: Superhuman exposes a documented OAuth-protected MCP server for Superhuman Mail at `https://mcp.mail.superhuman.com/mcp`; its developer pages mainly route developers to separate Coda and Grammarly platforms rather than additional first-party APIs on `superhuman.com`.
